requirementCueLines: Mathematics: MATH 124, MATH 125, MATH 126 (or MATH 134, MATH 135, MATH 136) (15 credits)
Introductory Applied Mathematics: AMATH 351, AMATH 352, AMATH 353 (9 credits)
1) Methods of Applied Mathematics: Minimum two courses from AMATH 401, AMATH 402, AMATH 403
2) Modeling: Minimum two courses from AMATH 342, AMATH 383, AMATH 422, AMATH 423
3) Computing and Data Sciences: Minimum two courses from AMATH 481, AMATH 482, AMATH 483, CFRM 410, CFRM 420, CFRM 421
4) Additional courses from the above lists to bring the elective minimum total to 27 credits.
General Education requirements for College of Arts and Sciences students may be found here .
